headline_seed: National Guard deploys as flash floods in West Virginia inundate homes and businesses - AP News
draft_text:
#BreakingMews Flash floods hit West Virginia Tuesday night. Gov. Patrick Morrisey declared emergencies in all 55 counties and deployed the National Guard. Up to 7 inches of rain fell. ABC News and CBS News report dozens rescued from submerged vehicles.

And that's the mews.
